zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily de Balliol於1237年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆巴納德 卡素時，她的父親Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland46歲，母親Lora de Valognes27歲。她於1256年與John de Burgh在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1289年在她的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily de Balliol于1237年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆巴納德 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland46岁，母亲Lora de Valognes27岁。她于1256年与John de Burgh在英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1289年在她的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily de Balliol was born in 1237, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland, was 46 and her mother, Lora de Valognes, was 27. She married John de Burgh in 1256, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1289, in her hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Barnard Castle, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily de Balliol est née en 1237, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Lora de Valognes, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John de Burgh en 1256, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1289, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily de Balliol 1237 in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland 46 und ihre Mutter Lora de Valognes 27. Sie hat 1256 in Barnard Castle, Durham, England John de Burgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1289 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Barnard Castle, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Balliol è nata il nel 1237 nel Barnard Castle, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Lora de Valognes, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John de Burgh nel 1256, nel Barnard Castle, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1289, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Barnard Castle, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily de Balliolが1237年にイギリスイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotlandは46歳，母Lora de Valognesは27歳であった。1256年にイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルでJohn de Burghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1289年に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 스타우 쿠 크이
ko.lifeSummary: Cecily de Balliol(이)가 1237년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lora de Valognes(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1256년 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 John de Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1289년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Balliol nasceu em 1237, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Lora de Valognes, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Burgh em 1256, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1289, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England, U: стоу кум куи, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily de Balliol родилась в 1237 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Lora de Valognes, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Burgh в 1256 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1289 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily de Balliol nació en 1237, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Lora de Valognes, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John de Burgh en 1256, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1289, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra.
